DP.062.0000:
There are eight Gym Leaders in
the Sinnoh region.\f
The objective for Trainers is
to get Gym Badges from them all.
DP.062.0001:
A Gym Leader isn’t just like any
Trainer you meet.\f
I’d take as many Pokémon as possible
if I were you.
DP.062.0004:
Roark lets us train our Pokémon in
the mine.
